property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\admin\.codex\tmp\arg0\codex-arg0BEFu8L;C:\Users\admin\.cache\codex-runtimes\codex-primary-runtime\dependencies\bin\override;D:\VMware Workstation\bin\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;D:\MYSQL\bin;D:\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;D:\python\Scripts\;D:\python\;C:\Users\admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;c:\Trae CN\bin;C:\Users\admin\.local\bin;C:\Users\admin\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\admin\AppData\Local\JetBrains\Toolbox\scripts;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Users\admin\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\DataGrip 2021.1\bin;D:\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2023.3.5\bin;C:\Users\admin\AppData\Roaming\npm;D:\PyCharm 2026.1.2\bin;C:\Users\admin\.cache\codex-runtimes\codex-primary-runtime\dependencies\bin\fallback;C:\Users\admin\AppData\Local\OpenAI\Codex\bin\ada252862d154cdd;C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\OpenAI.Codex_26.715.8383.0_x64__2p2nqsd0c76g0\app\resources;.

testcase.name: tokenExceptionReturnsHttp401
testcase.system-out: 22:48:31.173 [main] ERROR com.yanque.commons.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler -- 业务异常捕获 , message = Token不合法或登录状态已失效: com.yanque.commons.exception.BusinessException: Token不合法或登录状态已失效 at com.yanque.commons.exception.BusinessException.of(BusinessException.java:34) at
